lookup_join_basic.comment: Tests lookup join with a dimension table. V1 and V2 pass end-to-end. Lite mode is skipped because the broker lacks DimensionTableDataManager. The V2 path is additionally validated at the planner level by LookupJoinPlanTest.

queries.description: Basic lookup join - inner join with dim table
queries.sql: SELECT /*+ joinOptions(join_strategy='lookup') */ {fact_tbl}.dim_key, {dim_tbl}.name FROM {fact_tbl} JOIN {dim_tbl} ON {fact_tbl}.dim_key = {dim_tbl}.id ORDER BY {fact_tbl}.dim_key, {dim_tbl}.name
